default_terms:
TERMS & CONDITIONS
1. INVOICE SUBMISSION REQUIREMENTS

* PO Reference: Every invoice must clearly display the Aramco Purchase Order (PO) number and relevant line item numbers.
* Supporting Documentation: All invoices for goods must include a signed Freight Bill or Bill of Lading. Service invoices must include signed Time Sheets or Service Entry Sheets (SES) approved by an authorized Aramco representative.
* Separation: A separate invoice must be submitted for each individual shipment or milestone.
* Itemization: Invoices must list the manufacturer’s name, part numbers, unit prices, and extended totals exactly as they appear on the PO.

2. PAYMENT TERMS

* Standard Period: Payment is generally due 30 days from the date Aramco receives both a valid invoice and the corresponding goods or services.
* Discount Period: Any "Cash Discount" periods begin only upon receipt of a correct and undisputed invoice at the designated accounts payable office.
* Currency: Payment will be made in the currency specified in the PO. Conversion rates, if applicable, are determined by Aramco’s corporate exchange policy.

3. TAXES & WITHHOLDING

* VAT/GST: Value Added Tax must be itemized separately. A valid Tax Invoice containing the vendor’s Tax Registration Number (TRN) is mandatory for payment.
* Withholding: Aramco reserves the right to withhold payments to cover any outstanding liens, uncorrected work, or failure by the vendor to provide required insurance or safety documentation.

4. REIMBURSABLE EXPENSES

* Receipts: Original receipts are required for all reimbursable expenses exceeding $25.00 (or local equivalent).
* Pre-Approval: Only expenses explicitly authorized in the PO or Contract will be honored.

5. RIGHT OF OFFSET

* Aramco may deduct from any invoice any amounts the vendor owes to Aramco under the current agreement or any other contract.

6. DISPUTED INVOICES

* In the event of a discrepancy, Aramco will notify the vendor. The payment clock for the disputed portion is suspended until a corrected invoice is provided.
